stemHtml: A fault develops in the Mach Trim system of an aircraft prior to flight, rendering the system inoperative. Which of the following is the correct course of action?

options.a: The aircraft must be removed from passenger service immediately, but may be flown once for maintenance, subject to speed and altitude limitations.
options.b: The flight crew must be informed of the failure, and the aircraft may continue to carry passengers, provided speed and altitude restrictions are observed.
options.c: The aircraft must be grounded until the Mach trim system is fully repaired, with no exceptions.
options.d: The system is not critical and the aircraft can be flown without it, without any operational limitations.
